mapper.select: SELECT u.user_seq AS userSeq, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_level AS userLevel, a.cash_balance AS cashBalance FROM users AS u JOIN user_account AS a ON u.user_seq = a.user_seq WHERE u.user_seq = #{userSeq}
mapper.update: update users set user_level = IF(user_level < substring(#{lessonId}, 3, 1), substring(#{lessonId}, 3, 1), user_level) where user_seq = #{userSeq}
